wayhold_roads.speaker: WAYFARER
pages: Wayhold sits at the mouth of the Sundered Reaches.
Four domains lie beyond. The roads will open as you prove yourself.
When they do, choose where to walk first.

wayhold_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: WAYHOLD. Last warm hearth before the Reaches.

lore_wayhold.speaker: LORE
pages: When the Vale was sundered, four powers scattered to four lands.
The Reaches remember. They do not forgive.

cinderwaste_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: CINDERWASTE. The fire never went out here. Bring cold.

lore_cinder.speaker: LORE
pages: The first power was flame. It learned to walk, and it did not stop burning.

hoarfrost_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: HOARFROST HOLD. The cold keeps what it takes. Bring warmth.

lore_hoarfrost.speaker: LORE
pages: The second power was frost. It froze the question, and the answer, and the asker.

stormreach_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: STORMREACH. The sky is a weapon here. Ground yourself.

lore_storm.speaker: LORE
pages: The third power was the storm. It never decided what it wanted, and so it took everything.

stormreach_sealed.speaker: STORM GATE
pages: The storm road will not open yet.
Cinderwaste and Hoarfrost must both fall before the sky lets you pass.

themire_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: THE MIRE. Where the four powers drained, and something drank them.

lore_mire.speaker: LORE
pages: The fourth power was rot, and under it, the gloom that waited for all four.
It has a name now. It is the Gloamwarden.

themire_sealed.speaker: MIRE GATE
pages: The mire will not take you yet. Bring down the Tempest first.

reaches_done.speaker: THE REACHES
pages: The Gloamwarden falls. The four powers are quiet at last.
The Sundered Reaches are yours to wander.

emberforge_sign.speaker: SIGN
pages: THE EMBERFORGE. Wake the bellows. Something is still being made down here.

lore_emberforge.speaker: LORE
pages: The forge never cooled. It only waited for hands foolish enough to work it.
